headline: Next-Gen Biometric Solutions for a Secure World
description: Factory-direct manufacturer of palm vein recognition modules, palm vein recognition terminals, facial recognition time clocks, pre-shift breathalyzer terminals, 8-inch portable time clocks, and palm vein POS devices. With an in-house software development team and over 10 years of exceptional manufacturing experience, we have earned the trust of partners in more than 20 countries.
